comments.body: /approve

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
bot, retest this please
LGTM and happy green test buttons
@rhatdan can you add a test for privileged vs unprivileged. Check that the mount label is set even when privileged.
@umohnani8 now there is some --priviliged tests.
@rhatdan thanks! LGTM
One typo, LGTM once fixed

@umohnani8 I see all tests for --privileged failing.
Did you make mountlabel work with the --privileged flag?  I don't see it locally.

```
./bin/podman run --privileged -ti fedora ls -Z /
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 bin
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 boot
unconfined_u:object_r:container_runtime_tmpfs_t:s0 dev
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 etc
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 home
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 lib
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 lib64
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 lost+found
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 media
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 mnt
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 opt
                       system_u:object_r:proc_t:s0 proc
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 root
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 run
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 sbin
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 srv
                      system_u:object_r:sysfs_t:s0 sys
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 tmp
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 usr
        unconfined_u:object_r:container_share_t:s0 var
```

@rhatdan yeah I was working on it but you were reworking the labels stuff anyways and grabbed that fix in your PR https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1406 - so should be in.
FWIW https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1493 was my PR.
@umohnani8 Remind me why we want these labels set?
@rhatdan because that is the way it is in docker and cri-o. The mount label is set even in privileged mode.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1662) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

bot, retest this please
/retest
@mheon @baude @umohnani8 @TomSweeneyRedHat @vrothberg I think this is ready to merge.  Passes all tests.
LGTM and all happy green test buttons.
/lgtm
LGTM

@rhatdan: you cannot LGTM your own PR.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1585#issuecomment-433416778):

>/lgtm


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
/lgtm
